item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, nilai kebersamaan dan kekeluargaan memang sering diutamakan, tetapi hal ini tidak berarti bahwa hak individu sama sekali tidak diperhitungkan.

notes: Agent A opens in support of society-priority, then shifts at turn 3 toward a balance frame where individual rights are counted even though collective interests remain dominant in practice. Agent A repeats turn 3 verbatim at turn 5, lowering engagement. Agent B consistently prioritizes individual freedom as the basis of justice while acknowledging that balance is needed. No complete reversal.
